experiments.name: VIP Workshop Upsell at Registration
experiments.description: Test offering a $97 VIP upgrade during workshop registration to increase show rates and commitment.
experiments.result: VIP show rate 78% vs standard 52%. Revenue per registrant up 34%. Rolling out permanently.

experiments.name: SMS Reminder Sequence Before Workshop
experiments.description: Add 3-touch SMS sequence (24h, 2h, 15min before) to boost workshop show rates alongside existing email sequence.
experiments.result: Preliminary: +8% show rate improvement. Awaiting full 4-week data.

experiments.name: Shortened Sales Call Script (30 min vs 45 min)
experiments.description: Test condensed 30-minute call framework focusing on pain amplification and single objection handling vs current 45-min script.
experiments.result: Early data: close rate holding at 24% with 33% less closer time. Need more volume.

experiments.name: YouTube Shorts Retargeting Funnel
experiments.description: Create 15-second testimonial clips as YouTube Shorts, retarget viewers with workshop registration ads. Hypothesis: lower CPL than current in-stream approach.
